== apparch ==
[Info] g3ts-apparch/types-dependency-direction - types layer depends only on allowed layers
  Types layer files import only `types` siblings or no apparch-owned layers.
[Info] g3ts-apparch/logic-dependency-direction - logic layer depends only on allowed layers
  Logic layer files import only `logic`, `types`, or no apparch-owned layers.
[Info] g3ts-apparch/io-outbound-dependency-direction - io/outbound layer depends only on allowed layers
  io/outbound layer files import only `io/outbound`, `types`, or no apparch-owned layers.
[Info] g3ts-apparch/io-inbound-dependency-direction - io/inbound layer depends only on allowed layers
  io/inbound layer files import only `io/inbound`, `logic`, `types`, or no apparch-owned layers.
[Info] g3ts-apparch/app-no-direct-outbound - app shell avoids direct outbound imports
  App shell files do not import `io/outbound` directly.
[Info] g3ts-apparch/types-purity - types layer stays free of Next and React runtime imports
  Types layer files do not import `next/*`, `react`, or `react-dom` runtime modules.
[Info] g3ts-apparch/logic-purity - logic layer stays free of Next and React runtime imports
  Logic layer files do not import `next/*`, `react`, or `react-dom` runtime modules.
[Info] g3ts-apparch/types-public-surface - types layer keeps behavioral API out of its public surface
  Types layer files expose no exported functions or classes.
[Info] g3ts-apparch/io-contracts-in-types - io layers keep interface contracts out of their public surface
  io/inbound and io/outbound expose no exported interfaces.

== apparch ==
[Error] g3ts-apparch/types-dependency-direction src/types/user.ts types layer imports forbidden app layer
  `src/types/user.ts` in `types` imports `src/logic/get_user.ts` in `logic`. Keep `types` passive and move behavior or framework coupling outward.
[Error] g3ts-apparch/logic-dependency-direction src/logic/get_user.ts logic layer imports forbidden app layer
  `src/logic/get_user.ts` in `logic` imports `src/io/inbound/http.ts` in `io/inbound`. Logic must stay independent of app shell and concrete io adapters.
[Error] g3ts-apparch/io-outbound-dependency-direction src/io/outbound/db.ts io/outbound layer imports forbidden app layer
  `src/io/outbound/db.ts` in `io/outbound` imports `src/logic/get_user.ts` in `logic`. Outbound adapters must not depend on logic, inbound adapters, or the app shell.
[Error] g3ts-apparch/io-inbound-dependency-direction src/io/inbound/http.ts io/inbound layer imports forbidden app layer
  `src/io/inbound/http.ts` in `io/inbound` imports `src/io/outbound/db.ts` in `io/outbound`. Inbound adapters may call logic, but they must not reach outbound adapters or the app shell directly.
[Error] g3ts-apparch/app-no-direct-outbound src/app/page.tsx app shell imports io/outbound directly
  `src/app/page.tsx` in `app` imports `src/io/outbound/db.ts` in `io/outbound`. Keep Next entry files thin and delegate through inbound adapters or logic.
[Error] g3ts-apparch/types-purity src/types/user.ts types layer imports framework runtime module
  `src/types/user.ts` in `types` imports external module `next/navigation`. Keep `types` passive and free of Next/React runtime coupling.
[Error] g3ts-apparch/logic-purity src/logic/get_user.ts logic layer imports framework runtime module
  `src/logic/get_user.ts` in `logic` imports external module `react`. Keep `logic` independent from Next/React runtime code.
[Error] g3ts-apparch/types-public-surface src/types/user.ts types layer exposes behavioral API
  `src/types/user.ts` exports `makeUser` from `types`. Keep behavior out of `types` and move it into `logic` or another owning runtime layer.
[Error] g3ts-apparch/io-contracts-in-types src/io/inbound/http.ts io layer exposes interface contract
  `src/io/inbound/http.ts` exports interface `HttpPort` from `io/inbound`. Move shared contracts into `src/types`.
[Error] g3ts-apparch/io-contracts-in-types src/io/outbound/db.ts io layer exposes interface contract
  `src/io/outbound/db.ts` exports interface `DbPort` from `io/outbound`. Move shared contracts into `src/types`.
